Package us.crazycrew.crazycore.files

Class FileHandler

java.lang.Object
us.crazycrew.crazycore.files.FileManager
us.crazycrew.crazycore.files.FileHandler
public class FileHandler extends FileManager
The file manager module handles both .json and .yaml files with ease. It supports comments in the .yaml files and allows to grab the file configuration if needed.

    • extract

      public void extract(String value, Path directory)
      Extracts a set of files into the directory while creating the said directory.
      Parameters:
      value - the folder name
      directory - the output directory
